title: Adjust Ubuntu install info to also work on Pop!_OS

comments.body:
LGTM
Did not know about the ${ID^} syntax.
:-1: Rejected by too few approved reviews
@leorochael mind creating a similar one for podman as well please, if not already?
@cevich when you get back, can you remove the requirement for bors to have a approve setting. We maintain the two LGTM without having to go through multiple github operations.

@lsm5, The podman installation instructions use a different template for the URL:

 - http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}/

Which includes the `xUbuntu` segment literally, so the change above isn't necessary there as it already works for Pop!\_OS.

Truth be told, I could have "fixed" this PR by using the same URL from podman, since the installation section is explicitly talking about Ubuntu and there are no other `x{something}` folders at that URL.

> @lsm5, The podman installation instructions use a different template for the URL:
> 
>     * [http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}/](http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_$%7BVERSION_ID%7D/)
> 

Ack, sgtm, thanks again!

> when you get back, can you remove the requirement for bors to have a approve setting. We maintain the two LGTM without having to go through multiple github operations.

I thought I took care of that, IIRC this `0` setting means only 'bors r+' should be needed.

https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/bors.toml#L41-L44

@rhatdan is it working okay now?
